title: validators/ 레이어는 현재 비어있어도 유지한다
summary: Decides to retain backend/src/validators/voc.ts as a documented architectural seam for BE-only validation rules even though it currently only re-exports shared/contracts.
notes: ADR path + Context/Decision/Considered Options structure confirm ADR. No explicit Status field present; locked=false because Accepted status is not stated.
